001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest;
011
012/**
013 * Response to CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest.
014 *
015 * Binary layout (2 bytes total):
016 *   offset 0 (1 byte): status        - 0 = ACK/success, 1 = NACK/failure
017 *   offset 1 (1 byte): validity      - nonzero = true, CGM support package is valid
018 *
019 * The Tandem app reads byte[0] as ResponseStatus (ACK=0, NACK=1) and
020 * byte[1] as a boolean validity flag via Byte_ExtKt.readBoolean (nonzero = true).
021 */
022/**
023 * Response to CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest.
024 *
025 * Binary layout (2 bytes total):
026 *   offset 0 (1 byte): status        - 0 = ACK/success, 1 = NACK/failure
027 *   offset 1 (1 byte): validity      - nonzero = true, CGM support package is valid
028 *
029 * The Tandem app reads byte[0] as ResponseStatus (ACK=0, NACK=1) and
030 * byte[1] as a boolean validity flag via Byte_ExtKt.readBoolean (nonzero = true).
031 *
032
033 *
034 * <br>
035 *
036 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest}, opCode -55, size 2
037 *
038 * <br>
039 *
040 * 
041 * <table border='1'>
042 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-55</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>2</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
047 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
048 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#API_FUTURE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
049 * </table>
050 */@MessageProps(
051    opCode=-55,
052    size=2,
053    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
054    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
055    request=CgmSupportPackageStatusRequest.class,
056    minApi=KnownApiVersion.API_FUTURE
057)
058public class CgmSupportPackageStatusResponse extends Message {
059    private int status;
060    private boolean validity;
061
062    public CgmSupportPackageStatusResponse() {}
063
064    public CgmSupportPackageStatusResponse(int status, boolean validity) {
065        this.cargo = buildCargo(status, validity);
066        this.status = status;
067        this.validity = validity;
068    }
069
070    /**
071     * <table border="1">
072     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmSupportPackageStatusResponse:</caption>
073     * <tr><td><code>status</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
074     * <tr><td><code>validity</code></td><td><code>(raw[1] &amp; 0xFF) != 0</code></td></tr>
075     * </table>
076     */
077    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
078        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
079        this.cargo = raw;
080        this.status = raw[0] & 0xFF;
081        this.validity = (raw[1] & 0xFF) != 0;
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * <table border="1">
086     * <caption>Byte layout for CgmSupportPackageStatusResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
087     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
088     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) (status &amp; 0xFF)</code></td></tr>
089     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>(byte) (validity ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
090     * </table>
091     */
092    public static byte[] buildCargo(int status, boolean validity) {
093        return Bytes.combine(
094            new byte[]{ (byte) (status & 0xFF) },
095            new byte[]{ (byte) (validity ? 1 : 0) });
096    }
097
098    /**
099     * @return the raw status byte: 0 = ACK (success), 1 = NACK (failure)
100     */
101    public int getStatus() {
102        return status;
103    }
104
105    /**
106     * @return true if the status is ACK (success), false if NACK
107     */
108    public boolean isSuccess() {
109        return status == 0;
110    }
111
112    /**
113     * @return true if the CGM support package is valid (byte[1] nonzero),
114     *         as reported by the Tandem app's CGMSupportPackageStatusCargo.validity()
115     */
116    public boolean getValidity() {
117        return validity;
118    }
119}
